summary: Plato: Phaedo — source for anamnesis, body_as_obstacle, soul_migration
description:
**Parent:** Corpus Expansion Tier 1 (child 2 of 8)

## Source

- **Translator / license:** Jowett, 1871. US-PD.
- **URL:** https://www.sacred-texts.com/cla/plato/phaedo.htm
- **Structure:** single `<PRE>` page, ~155KB, continuous dialogue.
- **Format:** `html`
- **Chunking:** `paragraph-group`, 6–8 paras.

## Concept payload

`anamnesis` (recollection), `body_as_obstacle` (body-as-tomb), `soul_migration` — bridges Orphic/Pythagorean transmigration (already in `greek_mystery`) to Gnostic soul-imprisonment.

## Ref

`docs/corpus-expansion-candidates.md` §3.2

resolution.note: Acquired raw; chunked to 44 paragraph-group chunks. Same shape as Timaeus + Symposium. Sources floating concepts anamnesis + body_as_obstacle + soul_migration.
